Donkey
Radiance of Mysteries Scepter

Once in a while, the unit launches fireballs at 3 random enemy units. When the ball hits, it explodes, dealing 224000 magic damage to the target and all enemy units in a small radius around it. This damage ignores shields and damage-reducing effects. All affected enemy units are also set on fire for 3 sec. Burning units receive 192000 magic damage, and their healing rate is reduced by 35% for 3 sec. If the affected enemy units have less than 35% health within 3 sec. after the being hit with the fireball, they additionally receive magic damage equal to 40% of the scepter wielder's spell power. Also, if enemy units that have received this magic damage die within 3 sec. after receiving it, they cannot be resurrected for 3 sec.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet

Cooldown: 8 secs
